ops.text:
PRE-REGISTERED PROTOCOL (E22). Cap $5. PENDING-E15: CI-only, NO promote/kill verdict.

QUESTION: Does prepending top-k=3 retrieved past corrections to the watcher scoring context move sentinel AUC on the frozen eval frame, with zero training?

DATA (read-only clones under ~/.cc-steer/experiments/E22/inputs/):
- Eval frame: inputs/eval, 628 rows, 335 positives, digest e85dc4a2ec94aae0. Each row.tail is the exact rendered context the served watcher scored.
- Retrieval index: 3153 voyage-4-large exemplar vectors (dim 1024) in cloned feedback.db, TRAIN-split steering events only. frame_id/index_key overlap = 0 (self-retrieval contamination guard).
- Stored served probs: inputs/eval/probs/v002-20260718-cdfabf2f3a48.json (dataset_digest must match frame.digest).

METHOD (harness /Users/yasyf/.cc-steer/experiments/E22/run.py, imports workspace cc_steer; never edits repo source):
1. For each row: embed tail[-16000:] as Voyage query (voyage-4-large, input_type=query); MMR select top_n=32 -> k=3 (diversity=0.5); hydrate via exemplars_for (context_text capped 2000 chars); block via watcher.cascade.exemplar_block; aug = HEADER + block + MOMENT + tail.
2. Score both arms with incumbent local watcher MlxDrafter (v002-20260718-cdfabf2f3a48, render=2) via nosteer_prob; fire = 1 - P(NO_STEER); clear_cache per row; one model at a time; unload at end.
3. AUC both arms via retrain.promotion.sentinel_auc(labels, fire).
4. Paired bootstrap on delta = auc_ret - auc_base: B=2000 resamples (>=1000 req), seed=1729, skip single-class resamples. Report delta point est + 95% CI, frac(delta>0), per-arm AUC CIs.

INSTRUMENT CHECK: base-arm nosteer_prob(tail) must reproduce stored served probs (report max abs diff). Gate: max_abs_diff small (<1e-2) or investigate.

ENV NOTE: workspace venv (/Users/yasyf/Code/cc-steer-exp1/.venv) lacked voyageai/python-dotenv (the 'embed' extra). Installed voyageai==0.5.0 + python-dotenv into the workspace .venv only (additive; NOT the forbidden /Users/yasyf/Code/cc-steer/.venv). Prior attempt died at start of scoring loop (out/run.log ends at watcher load). Reusing prior inputs + run.py.

SPEND: no LLM-judge calls (scoring is local MLX watcher). Only cost = Voyage query embeddings (628 x <=16000 chars ~ a few hundred K tokens; << $5 cap).

REPORT: headline = {auc_base, auc_retrieval, delta, ci95, k=3, frame_n=628}. CI-only, no verdict.
